parsed.production_notes: The video features a human-recorded actor interacting with a digitally created AI tutor avatar. The human scenes are clearly live-action, while the robot character is a CGI or AI-generated image.

characters.appearance: A young Indian man in his early 20s with a medium build and fair complexion. He has short, dark, neatly styled hair and light stubble on his face. His facial features are soft, and he has dark eyes.
characters.wardrobe: In scene 1 and 3, he wears a green puffer jacket over a dark shirt with a grey and brown plaid flat cap. In scene 2, he wears a dark olive green windbreaker jacket. In scene 3, he wears a textured, dark olive-green collared jacket.
characters.demeanor: Initially appears hesitant and slightly confused, but grows more confident and pleased with his progress throughout the video.

characters.appearance: A humanoid robot with a feminine-coded face, constructed from white and grey polished materials. It has large, expressive, glowing light-blue eyes, a small nose, and a subtle mouth. The head is smooth and white, and it wears large, black over-ear headphones.
characters.wardrobe: The character is a robot; its body is its 'wardrobe'. It wears a pair of large black headphones.
characters.demeanor: Calm, patient, and encouraging, with a consistently neutral-to-pleasant facial expression.

scenes.setting: An indoor room, likely a bedroom or living room. A prominent curtain with a bold black-and-white wavy pattern is visible, next to a mint-green wall. An intricately carved wooden headboard or chair is behind the character, and a shelf with a trophy can be seen in the background.
scenes.camera: Medium shot with a circular inset.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A, a young man, is sitting indoors, looking down and to his left with a thoughtful expression. He is wearing a green puffer jacket and a grey plaid flat cap. The background features a striking black and white patterned curtain, a mint green wall, and a piece of carved wooden furniture. A small trophy sits on a shelf in the upper right.

A close-up of Character B, a white humanoid robot's head, is shown inside a circle. The robot has large, glowing blue eyes and wears black headphones. Its expression is neutral and attentive against a blurred background.

scenes.visual_description: A composite shot showing Character A in his room learning English. In the top left, a circular inset displays the face of his AI tutor, Character B. Text overlays appear, including a 'Day 1' tag on the inset, subtitles for the dialogue, and a promotional banner that reads 'Join today for Just ₹3'.
